---
title: "SS Model"
author: "Hammed Olayinka"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Data setup

```{r}
msa_data_level <- read.csv("MSA_data.csv", header = TRUE)
msa_data <-sqrt(msa_data_level)
mdata <- data.frame(lapply(msa_data, diff))
MSA_data<-data.frame(lapply(msa_data, function(x) diff(x, differences = 2)))
MSA_data<-as.matrix(MSA_data)
head(MSA_data)
```



```{r}
## ==============================================================
## SINGLE-SERIES (SS) BASELINE MODEL
## --------------------------------------------------------------
##   - a0 = 2
##   - b0 = 2
##   - grid_len = 100
##   - beta_prior_mean = OLS estimate from regressing Y on lag(Y)
## ==============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(coda)
  library(dplyr)
})

set.seed(44)

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 0) Leave-one-out split
## --------------------------------------------------------------
Y_full  <- as.matrix(MSA_data)
Y_test  <- Y_full[nrow(Y_full), , drop = FALSE]
Y_train <- Y_full[-nrow(Y_full), , drop = FALSE]

T_full <- nrow(Y_full)
Tt     <- nrow(Y_train)
L      <- ncol(Y_train)

if (Tt < 2) stop("Need at least 2 training observations after leaving out the last row.")

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 1) Utilities
## --------------------------------------------------------------
rinvgamma1 <- function(shape, scale) {
  1 / rgamma(1, shape = shape, rate = 1 / scale)
}

rmvnorm_chol <- function(mu, Sigma) {
  R <- chol(Sigma)
  as.numeric(mu + t(R) %*% rnorm(length(mu)))
}

build_X_single <- function(y_train, y0) {
  n <- length(y_train)
  xlag <- c(y0, y_train[1:(n - 1)])
  cbind(Intercept = 1, Lag = xlag)
}

## OLS estimate by regressing Y on its lag values
## Uses rows 2,...,T and lags from rows 1,...,T-1
ols_beta_from_lags <- function(y_train) {
  y_train <- as.numeric(y_train)
  n <- length(y_train)
  if (n < 2) stop("Need at least 2 observations for OLS lag regression.")

  y_resp <- y_train[2:n]
  x_lag  <- y_train[1:(n - 1)]

  X_ols <- cbind(Intercept = 1, Lag = x_lag)
  as.numeric(solve(crossprod(X_ols), crossprod(X_ols, y_resp)))
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 2) Posterior pieces at fixed y0
## --------------------------------------------------------------
posterior_components_y0 <- function(y_train, y0,
                                    beta_prior_mean,
                                    Sigma0,
                                    a0,
                                    b0) {
  y_train <- as.numeric(y_train)
  X <- build_X_single(y_train, y0)
  y <- y_train

  S0_inv <- solve(Sigma0)
  XtX    <- crossprod(X)
  Xty    <- crossprod(X, y)

  ## posterior precision and mean for beta | sigma2, y0, y
  Pn <- XtX + S0_inv
  mn <- solve(Pn, Xty + S0_inv %*% beta_prior_mean)

  ## OLS estimate using X(y0)
  beta_hat <- solve(XtX, Xty)

  ## b_(y0) matching the stated framework
  resid_hat <- y - X %*% beta_hat
  term1 <- as.numeric(crossprod(resid_hat))

  term2 <- as.numeric(
    t(beta_hat - beta_prior_mean) %*%
      XtX %*%
      solve(XtX + S0_inv) %*%
      S0_inv %*%
      (beta_hat - beta_prior_mean)
  )

  b_y0 <- term1 + term2 + b0

  if (!is.finite(b_y0) || b_y0 <= 0) {
    return(list(log_post = -Inf, Pn = Pn, mn = mn, b_y0 = NA_real_))
  }

  logdet_Pn <- as.numeric(determinant(Pn, logarithm = TRUE)$modulus)

  ## pi(y0 | y) ∝ |XtX + S0_inv|^{-1/2} * [b_(y0)]^{-(T+a0)/2} * I[c0,d0](y0)
  log_post <- -0.5 * logdet_Pn - 0.5 * (length(y) + a0) * log(b_y0)

  list(log_post = log_post, Pn = Pn, mn = mn, b_y0 = b_y0)
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 3) Fit one single-series baseline by direct posterior sampling
## --------------------------------------------------------------
fit_single_series_baseline <- function(y_train,
                                       n_draws = 1000,
                                       grid_len = 100,
                                       Sigma0 = diag(c(1e4, 1e4), 2),
                                       a0 = 2,
                                       b0 = 2) {

  y_train <- as.numeric(y_train)
  n <- length(y_train)

  ## Prior mean for beta = OLS estimate from regressing Y on lag(Y)
  beta_prior_mean <- ols_beta_from_lags(y_train)

  ## Uniform prior support for y0
  c0 <- 0.75 * min(y_train)
  d0 <- 1.25 * max(y_train)

  if (!is.finite(c0) || !is.finite(d0) || c0 >= d0) {
    stop("Invalid support for y0: need c0 < d0.")
  }

  y0_grid <- seq(c0, d0, length.out = grid_len)

  comp_list <- lapply(y0_grid, function(g) {
    posterior_components_y0(
      y_train = y_train,
      y0 = g,
      beta_prior_mean = beta_prior_mean,
      Sigma0 = Sigma0,
      a0 = a0,
      b0 = b0
    )
  })

  log_post <- vapply(comp_list, function(z) z$log_post, numeric(1))
  w <- exp(log_post - max(log_post))
  w[!is.finite(w)] <- 0
  if (sum(w) <= 0) stop("All marginal posterior weights for y0 are zero or non-finite.")
  w <- w / sum(w)

  idx_draws <- sample(seq_along(y0_grid), size = n_draws, replace = TRUE, prob = w)

  y0_draws     <- numeric(n_draws)
  beta_draws   <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_draws, ncol = 2)
  sigma2_draws <- numeric(n_draws)

  for (s in seq_len(n_draws)) {
    idx  <- idx_draws[s]
    y0s  <- y0_grid[idx]
    comp <- comp_list[[idx]]

    ## sigma2 | y0, y ~ IG((T+a0)/2, b_(y0)/2)
    sigma2_s <- rinvgamma1(
      shape = (n + a0) / 2,
      scale = comp$b_y0 / 2
    )

    ## beta | y0, y, sigma2 ~ N(mn, sigma2 * (XtX + S0_inv)^(-1))
    Pn_inv <- solve(comp$Pn)
    beta_s <- rmvnorm_chol(
      mu = as.numeric(comp$mn),
      Sigma = sigma2_s * Pn_inv
    )

    y0_draws[s]     <- y0s
    sigma2_draws[s] <- sigma2_s
    beta_draws[s, ] <- beta_s
  }

  colnames(beta_draws) <- c("beta0", "beta1")

  list(
    y0_draws = y0_draws,
    beta_draws = beta_draws,
    sigma2_draws = sigma2_draws,
    y0_grid = y0_grid,
    y0_weights = w,
    hyper = list(
      beta_prior_mean = beta_prior_mean,
      Sigma0 = Sigma0,
      a0 = a0,
      b0 = b0,
      c0 = c0,
      d0 = d0
    )
  )
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 4) Fit all series independently
## --------------------------------------------------------------
fit_single_baseline_panel <- function(Y_train,
                                      n_draws = 1000,
                                      grid_len = 100,
                                      Sigma0 = diag(c(1e4, 1e4), 2),
                                      a0 = 2,
                                      b0 = 2) {

  Y_train <- as.matrix(Y_train)
  L <- ncol(Y_train)

  if (length(b0) == 1) b0 <- rep(b0, L)

  fits <- vector("list", L)

  for (j in seq_len(L)) {
    fits[[j]] <- fit_single_series_baseline(
      y_train = Y_train[, j],
      n_draws = n_draws,
      grid_len = grid_len,
      Sigma0 = Sigma0,
      a0 = a0,
      b0 = b0[j]
    )
  }

  beta0_draws  <- sapply(fits, function(z) z$beta_draws[, 1])
  beta1_draws  <- sapply(fits, function(z) z$beta_draws[, 2])
  sigma2_draws <- sapply(fits, function(z) z$sigma2_draws)
  y0_draws     <- sapply(fits, function(z) z$y0_draws)

  if (is.null(dim(beta0_draws))) {
    beta0_draws  <- matrix(beta0_draws, ncol = 1)
    beta1_draws  <- matrix(beta1_draws, ncol = 1)
    sigma2_draws <- matrix(sigma2_draws, ncol = 1)
    y0_draws     <- matrix(y0_draws, ncol = 1)
  }

  colnames(beta0_draws)  <- colnames(Y_train)
  colnames(beta1_draws)  <- colnames(Y_train)
  colnames(sigma2_draws) <- colnames(Y_train)
  colnames(y0_draws)     <- colnames(Y_train)

  list(
    fits = fits,
    beta0_draws = beta0_draws,
    beta1_draws = beta1_draws,
    sigma2_draws = sigma2_draws,
    y0_draws = y0_draws,
    Y_train = Y_train,
    Y_test = Y_test
  )
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 5) Parameter summaries
## --------------------------------------------------------------
summarize_single_baseline_parameters <- function(fit_obj, prob = 0.95) {

  make_tbl <- function(draw_mat, prefix) {
    hpdi <- t(apply(draw_mat, 2, function(x) {
      HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = prob)[1, ]
    }))

    data.frame(
      MSA = if (is.null(colnames(draw_mat))) paste0("MSA_", seq_len(ncol(draw_mat))) else colnames(draw_mat),
      Mean = colMeans(draw_mat),
      SD = apply(draw_mat, 2, sd),
      HPDI = sprintf("(%.4f, %.4f)", hpdi[, 1], hpdi[, 2]),
      Parameter = prefix,
      row.names = NULL
    )
  }

  bind_rows(
    make_tbl(fit_obj$y0_draws, "y0"),
    make_tbl(fit_obj$beta0_draws, "beta0"),
    make_tbl(fit_obj$beta1_draws, "beta1"),
    make_tbl(fit_obj$sigma2_draws, "sigma2")
  ) %>%
    select(Parameter, everything())
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 6) Prediction of the left-out transformed value
## --------------------------------------------------------------
predict_leftout_diff2_single_baseline <- function(fit_obj, last_train_diff2_row) {
  n_draws <- nrow(fit_obj$beta0_draws)
  L       <- ncol(fit_obj$beta0_draws)

  preds <- matrix(NA_real_, nrow = n_draws, ncol = L)

  for (j in seq_len(L)) {
    ## Conditional mean for the left-out transformed value
    mu_j <- fit_obj$beta0_draws[, j] +
            fit_obj$beta1_draws[, j] * last_train_diff2_row[j]

    ## Posterior predictive draw:
    ## Delta^2 sqrt(y_T) = beta0 + beta1 * Delta^2 sqrt(y_{T-1}) + error
    preds[, j] <- rnorm(
      n = n_draws,
      mean = mu_j,
      sd = sqrt(fit_obj$sigma2_draws[, j])
    )
  }

  colnames(preds) <- colnames(fit_obj$beta0_draws)
  preds
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 7) Back-transform to level and compute prediction metrics
## --------------------------------------------------------------
predict_leftout_level_2diff_single_baseline <- function(fit_obj,
                                                        MSA_data,
                                                        mdata,
                                                        msa_data,
                                                        msa_data_level,
                                                        prob = 0.95) {

  T_full <- nrow(MSA_data)
  L      <- ncol(MSA_data)

  diff2_lag  <- as.numeric(MSA_data[T_full - 1, ])
  diff2_true <- as.numeric(MSA_data[T_full, ])

  diff1_prev <- as.numeric(mdata[nrow(mdata) - 1, ])
  sqrt_prev  <- as.numeric(msa_data[nrow(msa_data) - 1, ])
  true_level <- as.numeric(msa_data_level[nrow(msa_data_level), ])

  ## transformed-scale prediction happens here
  diff2_preds <- predict_leftout_diff2_single_baseline(fit_obj, diff2_lag)

  ## back-transform to level
  diff1_preds <- sweep(diff2_preds, 2, diff1_prev, "+")
  sqrt_preds  <- sweep(diff1_preds, 2, sqrt_prev, "+")
  level_preds <- sqrt_preds^2

  msa_names <- colnames(msa_data_level)
  if (is.null(msa_names)) msa_names <- paste0("MSA_", seq_len(L))
  colnames(level_preds) <- msa_names

  PM    <- colMeans(level_preds)
  PSD   <- apply(level_preds, 2, sd)
  Bias  <- PM - true_level
  PARB  <- abs(Bias / true_level)
  PRMSE <- sqrt(Bias^2 + PSD^2)

  hpdi <- t(apply(level_preds, 2, function(x) {
    HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = prob)[1, ]
  }))

  pred_table <- data.frame(
    MSA = msa_names,
    True = true_level,
    PM = PM,
    PSD = PSD,
    Bias = Bias,
    PARB = PARB,
    PRMSE = PRMSE,
    HPDI = sprintf("(%.4f, %.4f)", hpdi[, 1], hpdi[, 2]),
    row.names = NULL
  )

  list(
    diff2_true = diff2_true,
    level_preds = level_preds,
    true_level = true_level,
    pred_table = pred_table
  )
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 8) Relative-error summary
## --------------------------------------------------------------
error_summary_single_baseline <- function(level_preds, true_level, prob = 0.95) {

  n_draws <- nrow(level_preds)

  rel_err <- sweep(level_preds, 2, true_level, "-")
  rel_err <- sweep(rel_err, 2, true_level, "/")

  Mean_R    <- colMeans(rel_err)
  SD_R      <- apply(rel_err, 2, sd)
  MCSE_mean <- SD_R / sqrt(n_draws)
  CV_R      <- ifelse(abs(Mean_R) < .Machine$double.eps, NA_real_, SD_R / abs(Mean_R))

  hpdi <- t(apply(rel_err, 2, function(x) {
    HPDinterval(as.mcmc(x), prob = prob)[1, ]
  }))

  msa_names <- colnames(level_preds)
  if (is.null(msa_names)) msa_names <- paste0("MSA_", seq_len(ncol(level_preds)))

  data.frame(
    MSA = msa_names,
    Mean = Mean_R,
    SD = SD_R,
    MCSE_mean = MCSE_mean,
    CV = CV_R,
    HPDI = sprintf("(%.4f, %.4f)", hpdi[, 1], hpdi[, 2]),
    row.names = NULL
  )
}

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 9) Run everything
## --------------------------------------------------------------
single_fit <- fit_single_baseline_panel(
  Y_train = Y_train,
  n_draws = 1000,
  grid_len = 100,
  Sigma0 = diag(c(1e4, 1e4), 2),
  a0 = 2,
  b0 = 2
)

param_table_single <- summarize_single_baseline_parameters(single_fit)

pred_out_single <- predict_leftout_level_2diff_single_baseline(
  fit_obj = single_fit,
  MSA_data = MSA_data,
  mdata = mdata,
  msa_data = msa_data,
  msa_data_level = msa_data_level
)

pred_table_single <- pred_out_single$pred_table
err_table_single  <- error_summary_single_baseline(
  pred_out_single$level_preds,
  pred_out_single$true_level
)

## --------------------------------------------------------------
## 10) View results
## --------------------------------------------------------------
cat("\n--- Posterior Parameter Summaries: SS model ---\n")
print(param_table_single, row.names = FALSE, digits = 4)

cat("\n--- Posterior Prediction Metrics: SS model ---\n")
print(pred_table_single, row.names = FALSE, digits = 4)

cat("\n--- Relative-Error Metrics: SS model ---\n")
print(err_table_single, row.names = FALSE, digits = 4)
```
